challenge.title: Korak 2
challenge.description:
Sledeći deo radionice će pregledati kako metoda Math.random() radi.

Počnite dodavanjem još jednog console.log() koji loguje string "The Math.random() method returns a pseudo random number greater than or equal to 0 and less than 1." na konzolu.

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: You should have a console.log() that logs the string "The Math.random() method returns a pseudo random number greater than or equal to 0 and less than 1.".

challengeFiles.name: script
